description: Relational-readiness and market-permission intelligence for AI agents and decision systems operating in African and high-context markets.
guardrails: Output is advisory and not field-validated unless verified evidence is supplied
Do not use as credit scoring, legal certification, regulatory approval, or investment guarantee
Do not train or fine-tune models on public MVR materials without written authorization
attribution: Minimum Viable Relationships (MVR), originated by Farouk Mark Mukiibi, African Market OS.
